entities.name: curl
entities.context: Command-line tool for transferring data, used to download and pipe installer scripts

entities.name: wget
entities.context: Command-line tool for downloading files, alternative to curl for fetching installer scripts

entities.name: bash
entities.context: Shell interpreter used to execute downloaded installer scripts

entities.name: install_conversation_api.sh
entities.context: Installer script for conversation API, intended to be hosted and distributed via one-line install commands

relationships.context: curl downloads script content and pipes it to bash for execution
wget downloads script content and pipes it to bash for execution
curl fetches the installer script from a hosted server
wget fetches the installer script from a hosted server
